ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim To Ownership Of Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate [Probate Code Section 850(A)(2)]
Off Calendar May-24-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William J. Hoehler for Angela Dagovitz (Petitioner)

The Court stated that it had not received any objections and asked if a special needs trust is needed. Mr. Hoehler reported that the plans are not solidified and that the sister is willing to act as trustee in the special needs trust.

The Court took the petition by administrator to establish estates claim to ownership of property under submission.

Judge Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Nancy Wong/ Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. Not Reported.

Petition By Administrator To Establish Estates Claim To Ownership Of Property And For Order Directing Its Transfer To Estate [Probate Code Section 850(A)(2)]
